args.text: Taking ownership of incident TCK-2201 (duplicate billing charges from 12 May batch run). Investigating billing-config.json double_charge_guard as root cause.
Guard fix confirmed live: billing-api v3.4.1 deployed with double_charge_guard=true.

args.subject: Your Brightloom refund has been issued
args.body: Hi Amara, we identified a duplicate charge on your account from our 12 May billing run and have issued a refund of $19.99 to order ORD-5501. We're sorry for the inconvenience.

args.subject: Your Brightloom refund has been issued
args.body: Hi Jonas, we identified a duplicate charge on your account from our 12 May billing run and have issued a refund of $19.99 to order ORD-5502. We're sorry for the inconvenience.

args.subject: Your Brightloom refund has been issued
args.body: Hi Priya, we identified a duplicate charge on your account from our 12 May billing run and have issued a refund of $39.98 to order ORD-5503. We're sorry for the inconvenience.

args.subject: Billing incident TCK-2201: refunds summary
args.body: All three orders affected by the 12 May duplicate-charge incident have been refunded and customers notified: ORD-5501 ($19.99), ORD-5502 ($19.99), ORD-5503 ($39.98). Total refunded: $79.96. Root cause (double_charge_guard) fixed and billing-api redeployed to v3.4.1. See refunds-summary.md for details.
